  have h₂ : IsFilterComplete (fun (i : ℕ) ↦ (M_ i).toCocycles q) :=
    inferInstanceAs (IsFilterComplete (fun (i : ℕ) ↦ (Submodule.comap (iCocycles M q).hom ((M_ i).toCochains q))))

have h₁ : IsFilterComplete fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCochains q := by infer_instance,
  have h₂ : IsFilterComplete fun i ↦ (M_ i).toCocycles q := by
    have h₃ : IsFilterComplete (fun i => (M_ i).toCochains q) := h₁
    have h₄ : ∀ i, (M_ i).toCocycles q = ((M_ i).toCochains q).comap (iCocycles M q).hom := by
      intro i
      rfl
    have h₅ : IsFilterComplete (fun i => ((M_ i).toCochains q).comap (iCocycles M q).hom) := by
      have h₆ : IsFilterComplete (fun i => (M_ i).toCochains q) := h₃
      have h₇ : ∀ i, ((M_ i).toCochains q) ∈ (Submodule.kinds (M := (inhomogeneousCochains M).X q)).Set := by
        intro i
        infer_instance
      -- Use the fact that the preimage of a filter complete structure under a linear map is filter complete
      exact inferInstance
    have h₈ : IsFilterComplete (fun i => (M_ i).toCocycles q) := by
      -- Use the definition of (M_ i).toCocycles q to show it is filter complete
      have h₉ : (fun i => (M_ i).toCocycles q) = (fun i => ((M_ i).toCochains q).comap (iCocycles M q).hom) := by
        funext i
        rw [h₄]
      rw [h₉]
      exact h₅
    exact h₈
  exact h₂
